title: oldenlandia neomicrophylla
intro: Oldenlandia neomicrophylla is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae, commonly found in Southeast Asia. It is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antipyretic, and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Oldenlandia neomicrophylla include reducing fever, alleviating pain, and treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in decoctions, infusions, or dried forms, and is also used in the production of traditional remedies like teas and tonics.
